note: Generic archetype templates used when the specific format is unknown.

archetypes.name: Aggro
archetypes.strategy: Win fast with cheap, efficient creatures and burn before the opponent stabilizes.

archetypes.name: Midrange
archetypes.strategy: Trade resources efficiently, then win with individually powerful threats.

archetypes.name: Control
archetypes.strategy: Neutralize the opponent's threats, then win late with a small number of finishers.

archetypes.name: Combo
archetypes.strategy: Assemble a specific set of cards that wins the game immediately.
tells: cheap interaction to protect the combo

archetypes.name: Ramp
archetypes.strategy: Accelerate mana to deploy expensive, game-ending threats ahead of schedule.
tells: mana dorks and land ramp on turns 1-2
